sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT
    pipeline_name,
    domain,
    company_id,
    business_unit_id,
    load_type,
    start_date,
    end_date
FROM config.etl_configuration
WHERE isdeleted = 0
  AND is_active = 1
  AND pipeline_name = 'Revenue - TurboGEARBOX Pipeline'
  AND company_id = @{pipeline().parameters.company}
  AND business_unit_id = @{pipeline().parameters.business_unit};

scripts.text:
Delete from  stg.stg_turbo_data where [month]='month' ;
Delete from  stg.stg_turbo_data   where [month] is null and [qtr] is null and [year] is null ;

 update stg.stg_turbo_data
 set region = 'UNKNOWN'
 where region  is null ;

UPDATE stg.stg_turbo_data
SET
    sales_qty      = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), sales_qty),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    gross_sales    = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), gross_sales),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    normal_discount= CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), normal_discount),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    gross_rebates  = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), gross_rebates),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    net_rebates    = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), net_rebates),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    total_rebates  = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), total_rebates),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    total_discount = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), total_discount),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    provision_sales_return = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), provision_sales_return),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    foc            = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), foc),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    nsv            = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), nsv),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    rm             = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), rm),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    pk             = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), pk),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    other_rm       = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), other_rm),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    other          = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), other),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    material       = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), material),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    cogs_prod      = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), cogs_prod),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    dl             = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), dl),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    moh            = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), moh),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    sc             = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), sc),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    moh_total      = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), moh_total),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    gp             = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), gp),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    sales          = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), sales),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    distribution   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), distribution),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    g_a             = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), g_a),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    ho_allocation   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), ho_allocation),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    r_d   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), r_d),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    export   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), export),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    a_p   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), a_p),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    sales_promotion   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), sales_promotion),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    deferred_tax   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), deferred_tax),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    income_tax   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), income_tax),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    interest   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), interest),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    provision   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), provision),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    other_gain   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), other_gain),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    sales_bouns   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), sales_bouns),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    g_a_bouns   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), g_a_bouns),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    r_d_bonus   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), r_d_bonus),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    export_bonus   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), export_bonus),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    distribution_bouns   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), distribution_bouns),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    dl_bouns   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), dl_bouns),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    sc_bouns   = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), sc_bouns),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50)),
    qty_ton        = CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(DECIMAL(38,12), qty_ton),0),6) AS VARCHAR(50));


UPDATE stg.stg_turbo_data
SET
    sales_qty        = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,sales_qty))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE sales_qty END,
    gross_sales      = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,gross_sales))      < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE gross_sales END,
    normal_discount  = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,normal_discount))  < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE normal_discount END,
    gross_rebates    = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,gross_rebates))    < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE gross_rebates END,
    net_rebates      = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,net_rebates))      < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE net_rebates END,
    total_rebates    = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,total_rebates))    < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE total_rebates END,
    total_discount   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,total_discount))   < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE total_discount END,
    provision_sales_return = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,provision_sales_return)) < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE provision_sales_return END,
    foc              = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,foc))              < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE foc END,
    nsv              = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,nsv))              < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE nsv END,


	rm             = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,rm))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE rm END,
    pk             = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,pk))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE pk END,
    other_rm       = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,other_rm))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE other_rm END,
    other          = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,other))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE other END,
    material       = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,material))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE material END,
    cogs_prod      = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,cogs_prod))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE cogs_prod END,
    dl             = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,dl))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE dl END,
    moh            = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,moh))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE moh END,
    sc             = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,sc))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE sc END,
    moh_total      = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,moh_total))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE moh_total END,
    gp             = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,gp))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE gp END,
    sales          = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,sales))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE sales END,
    distribution   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,distribution))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE distribution END,
    g_a             = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,g_a))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE g_a END,
    ho_allocation   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,ho_allocation))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE ho_allocation END,
    r_d   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,r_d))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE r_d END,
    export   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,export))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE export END,
    a_p   =  CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,a_p))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE a_p END,
    sales_promotion   =  CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,sales_promotion))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE sales_promotion END,
    deferred_tax   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,deferred_tax))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE deferred_tax END,
    income_tax   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,income_tax))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE income_tax END,
    interest   =  CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,interest))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE interest END,
    provision   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,provision))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE provision END,
    other_gain   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,other_gain))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE other_gain END,
    sales_bouns   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,sales_bouns))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE sales_bouns END,
    g_a_bouns   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,g_a_bouns))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE g_a_bouns END,
    r_d_bonus   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,r_d_bonus))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE r_d_bonus END,
    export_bonus   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,export_bonus))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE export_bonus END,
    distribution_bouns   =  CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,distribution_bouns))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE distribution_bouns END,
    dl_bouns   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,dl_bouns))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE dl_bouns END,
    sc_bouns   = CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,sc_bouns))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE sc_bouns END,
    qty_ton        =  CASE WHEN ABS(TRY_CONVERT(FLOAT,qty_ton))        < 1E-8 THEN '0' ELSE qty_ton END;

body.value:
{
    "to": "suraj@netision.com",
    "notificationType": "SUCCESS",
    "subject": "Revenue ETL Pipeline SUCCESS",
    "pipelineName": variables('v_pipeline_name'),
    "company": variables('v_company_id'),
    "businessUnit": variables('v_business_unit_id'),
    "domain": variables('v_domain'),
    "logId": variables('v_log_id'),
    "batchId": "",
    "sourceFile": "",
    "status": "SUCCESS",
    "executionTime": "@{utcNow()}",
    "message": "Revenue- DATA ETL pipeline execution succeeded.",
    "errorMessage": ""
}
